Selected Work

9 projects,
one story.

2022 — 2025
01 / 09
Safety, Health & Compliance Monitoring Dashboard

A fully interactive Tableau dashboard built on public construction safety datasets. Tracks 535 incidents, OSHA compliance, near-miss events, and regional audit outcomes across 8 projects — giving safety managers a single source of truth for incident prevention.

TableauPublic DatasetOSHA Analytics535 Incidents
↗
↓ Hover to scroll dashboard
02 / 09
Asset Management Dashboard — $404B AUM Intelligence

A three-tab executive dashboard tracking $404B AUM across real estate, private equity, hedge funds, and credit. Covers performance fees, ROI vs IRR benchmarking, ESG allocation, and client retention — built for investment leadership teams.

Power BITableauFinance3-Tab Dashboard
↗
03
03 / 09
Zomato Analytics — Restaurant Intelligence

A 1-week competitive analysis sprint uncovering pricing patterns, cuisine trends, and city-level restaurant density across Indian metros. SQL-driven analysis with business expansion recommendations.

SQLPythonBusiness Analysis1-Week Sprint
Read Full Case Study ↗

9,551 restaurants analysed. North Indian cuisine 63%. Delhi 2.3× restaurant density vs Mumbai. Online delivery growing 18% YoY.

Read Case Study ↗
04
04 / 09
InsureNext 360 — Salesforce × Tableau

Built at a hackathon — integrates Salesforce CRM with Tableau to create a unified insurance intelligence platform. Visualises policyholder behaviour, claim trends, and agent performance in real time.

SalesforceTableauCRM AnalyticsHackathon
Watch Demo ↗

94% policy retention · 2.3× agent efficiency · ↓31% claim resolution time. Full Salesforce → Tableau pipeline in 48hrs.

Watch Demo ↗
05
05 / 09
AgriZenix — Smart Agriculture IoT System

10-month Chanakya Fellowship at IIT Bombay. Self-sustainable IoT agriculture node — ESP-32, RPi-4, solar power, YOLO v8 animal detection (mAP 86.2%), NPK soil prediction via SVR, and real-time farm dashboards.

IoTYOLO v8TensorFlowChanakya Fellowship
View Full Implementation ↗

22-class YOLO model · mAP 86.2% · Solar-powered node · NPK SVR prediction · ESP-32 + RPi-4 · OpenCV · Streamlit dashboard.

View Presentation ↗
06
06 / 09
Evaporative Cooler & Filter — Co-Invention

Co-invented a three-chamber terracotta apparatus combining evaporative cooling with commercial-grade water filtration for off-grid produce storage. First Runner-Up, Invention Factory 2023, IIT Bombay. Provisional patent filed.

HardwareProvisional PatentIIT Bombay🥈 First Runner-Up
View Presentation ↗

Three-chamber terracotta system. Evaporative cooling + commercial-grade filtration. Off-grid produce and fruit storage. Co-invented with Moningi Bhavana, IIT Bombay.

About

Engineer
by training.
Designer
by instinct.

I'm a Visual Analyst at Perceptive Analytics, working remotely from Mohali, India, building end-to-end BI solutions for US-based clients across finance, healthcare, and operations. I graduated from IIT Jammu with a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering (CGPA 8.47) and spent a year at IIT Bombay under the Chanakya Fellowship.

My work lives at the intersection of data, design, and decision-making. Whether I'm writing complex SQL, building executive dashboards in Power BI, or prototyping UI flows in Figma — I'm always thinking: what does this information need to do for the person looking at it?
